construction.panels: Standard baseball jersey construction with set-in short sleeves. Features a central front placket.
construction.seams: Standard stitching throughout, no visible contrast stitching.
construction.closures: Seven circular white buttons down the full-length front placket.
construction.details: V-neck collar. Short sleeves with double white stripes on the cuffs. Curved hem. White piping runs along the V-neck opening and parallel to the button placket on both sides. No visible pockets.

graphics.size: Approximately 13 inches wide by 3.5 inches tall at the center

branding.primary_logo: Small, colorful woven label with a purple, yellow, and orange design, likely the SkyyRose logo.
branding.logo_location: Interior back neck, visible through the V-neck opening.
branding.secondary_marks: Rectangular woven jock tag on the lower right front hem. Features a tan/brown background with 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' in black text at the top. Below this, a graphic resembling a baseball league logo with a red, blue, and white shield, a baseball bat, and a rose. Further below, 'AUTHENTIC APPAREL' in black text, and 'MADE FOR KINGS AND QUEENS' in black text.

fabric_appearance: Smooth jersey knit with a slight sheen, typical of performance polyester sports jerseys.
unique_features: Prominent 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' statement graphic. Custom 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' jock tag with unique baseball-themed branding and 'MADE FOR KINGS AND QUEENS' motto.
collection_aesthetic: Oakland luxury streetwear blending social consciousness with athletic-inspired design, conveying emotional expression and premium quality.
